facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 658 reviews. On a beach island better known for seafood.

Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is sitting at 07 Lê Lợi, Khu 1 and people keep coming back. Butter chicken, fresh naan, proper spice levels. Not watered down for tourists.

If you've been craving something different mid-trip, this is the answer.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the naan come out of that tandoor. Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc, 4.8 stars from 658 real reviews. This is what a great mid-trip reset looks like.

4.8 stars. 658 reviews. Indian food in Phu Quoc hitting this hard.

Bombay Indian Restaurant, 07 Lê Lợi. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Tandoor on. Naan fresh. 4.8 stars at Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc. Different kind of dinner tonight.
